name: lifeops-board
description: Render conversational schedule updates into a static LifeOps HTML board backed by iCloud JSON.

interface.shortDescription: Render iCloud schedules as static HTML
interface.longDescription: LifeOps Board stores interpreted schedule items in schedule.json, renders a static HTML weekly board, and keeps output/latest.html readable from iPhone Files without requiring JavaScript execution.
defaultPrompt: Use LifeOps Board to initialize my iCloud schedule root.
Use LifeOps Board to add this schedule and refresh output/latest.html.
Use LifeOps Board to render my current schedule board.
